title: RaftCraft
description: RaftCraft is a lightweight modpack that combines exploration, survival, and creation. Sail customized ships with Create contraptions
body:
![RaftCraft Create & VS2+Eureka](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55c7728369410ca2b417beb4be8bda0c2d7a3beb.png)

_**RaftCraft** is a modpack that combines exploration, survival, and creation. Sail customized ships with **Valkyrie Skies 2** and **Eureka**. Build machines and automated systems with Create._

----------

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10c1f5d924d585e04970e7a64bc877b08cb82424.png)

✅ [Valkyrien Skies 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies) + [Eureka](https://modrinth.com/mod/eureka) + [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)

✅ Overhauled World Vanilla+ ([Towns and Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers), [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined), Terralith, YUNG's Mods) 

✅ +++ Optimization and QOL Mods such as Mod Menu, Jei and much more!



------------



**Tips/Info+**


- When assembling a ship keep it disconnected from any other block other than water and air, with a safety distance of 2 or 3 blocks. Do not submerge the ship more than one block, as it will collide more frequently, even with kelps. Do not place stairs or slabs in the deepest part, as it may cause the water to bug

- Create Contraptions on moving ships are not recommended, can cause visual glitches.


- Disassemble ships if not using, that will help reduce server stress.


- Shaders with working Create Contraptions will reduce your FPS by 30-50% (on Very High), try not to have too much moving/superglue contraption at one time OR change your shader quality/performance settings. Also burn with lava all non-desired items or Install [Leaky](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/leaky).

- Autobackups are managed with the [Textile Backup mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/textile_backup/versions), helping keep your world safe from issues related to the VS2 mod (such as assembling a ship incorrectly)

- Suplementary Canons are working fine, don't forget to try them on your ship.
